---
title: "Project Setup and Model Development"
format: html
---

```{r}
#| label: Load Packages
#| warning: false
#| message: false

library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(brms)
```

```{r}
#| label: load-data

source(here("R", "data", "load_data.R"))
data <- load_data()
```

```{r}
#| label: build-team-games

source(here("R", "data", "build_team_games.R"))
team_games <- build_team_games(data$reg_season_results)
```

```{r}
#| label: build-team-season-features

source(here("R", "features", "build_team_season_features.R"))
team_season_features <- build_team_season_features(team_games)
```

```{r}
#| label: build-team-season-features-adjusted

source(here("R", "features", "build_team_season_features_adjusted.R"))
team_season_features_adjusted <- build_team_season_features_adjusted(team_games)
```

```{r}
#| label: build-matchup-training-data

source(here("R", "features", "build_matchup_training_data.R"))
matchup_training_data <- build_matchup_training_data(
  tourney_results = data$tourney_results,
  team_season_features = team_season_features,
  seeds = data$seeds)
```

```{r}
#| label: build-matchup-training-data-adjusted

source(here("R", "features", "build_matchup_training_data_adjusted.R"))
matchup_training_data_adjusted <- build_matchup_training_data_adjusted(
  tourney_results = data$tourney_results,
  team_season_features = team_season_features_adjusted,
  seeds = data$seeds)
```

```{r}
#| label: train-test-split

train_data <- matchup_training_data %>%
  filter(Season <= 2021)

test_data <- matchup_training_data %>%
  filter(Season >= 2022)
```

```{r}
#| label: fit-model-01-logistic

source(here("R", "models", "fit_model_01_logistic.R"))
model_01_logistic <- fit_model_01_logistic(train_data)

summary(model_01_logistic)
```

```{r}
#| label: source-rolling-brier-eval

source(here("R", "evaluation", "rolling_brier_eval.R"))
```

```{r}
#| label: rolling-brier-model-01

rolling_brier_01 <- rolling_brier_eval(
  data = matchup_training_data,
  fit_function = fit_model_01_logistic,
  test_seasons = c(2016:2019, 2021:2025))

rolling_brier_01

rolling_brier_01 %>%
  summarise(
    mean = mean(Brier),
    median = median(Brier),
    sd = sd(Brier),
    min = min(Brier),
    max = max(Brier))
```

```{r}
#| label: fit-model-02-efficiency

source(here("R", "models", "fit_model_02_efficiency.R"))
model_02_efficiency <- fit_model_02_efficiency(train_data)

summary(model_02_efficiency)
```

```{r}
#| label: rolling-brier-model-02

rolling_brier_02 <- rolling_brier_eval(
  data = matchup_training_data,
  fit_function = fit_model_02_efficiency,
  test_seasons = c(2016:2019, 2021:2025))

rolling_brier_02

rolling_brier_02 %>%
  summarise(
    mean = mean(Brier),
    median = median(Brier),
    sd = sd(Brier),
    min = min(Brier),
    max = max(Brier))
```

```{r}
#| label: train-test-split-adjusted
 
train_data_adjusted <- matchup_training_data_adjusted %>%
  filter(Season <= 2021)

test_data_adjusted <- matchup_training_data_adjusted %>%
  filter(Season >= 2022)
```

```{r}
#| label: fit-model-02b-adj-efficiency

source(here("R", "models", "fit_model_02b_adj_efficiency.R"))
model_02b_adj_efficiency <- fit_model_02b_adj_efficiency(train_data_adjusted)

summary(model_02b_adj_efficiency)
```

```{r}
#| label: rolling-brier-model-02b

rolling_brier_02b <- rolling_brier_eval(
  data = matchup_training_data_adjusted,
  fit_function = fit_model_02b_adj_efficiency,
  test_seasons = c(2016:2019, 2021:2025))

rolling_brier_02b

rolling_brier_02b %>%
  summarise(
    mean = mean(Brier),
    median = median(Brier),
    sd = sd(Brier),
    min = min(Brier),
    max = max(Brier))
```

```{r}
#| label: rolling-brier-comparison

rolling_brier_comparison <- bind_rows(
  rolling_brier_01 %>% 
    mutate(Model = "Model 1"),
  rolling_brier_02 %>% 
    mutate(Model = "Model 2"),
  rolling_brier_02b %>% 
    mutate(Model = "Model 2B")) %>%
  group_by(Model) %>%
  summarise(
    mean = mean(Brier),
    median = median(Brier),
    sd = sd(Brier),
    .groups = "drop")

rolling_brier_comparison
```

```{r}
#| label: build-team-rankings-2026

team_rankings_2026 <- team_season_features_adjusted %>%
  filter(Season == 2026) %>%
  left_join(data$teams, by = "TeamID") %>%
  arrange(desc(AdjNetEff)) %>%
  mutate(Rank = row_number()) %>%
  select(
    Rank,
    TeamID,
    TeamName,
    AdjNetEff,
    AdjOffEff,
    AdjDefEff,
    AdjSOS,
    GamesPlayed)

team_rankings_2026
```

```{r}
#| label: fill-csv

csv <- read_csv(here("data", "raw", "2026_Potential_Matchups.csv"))

team_strength_2026 <- team_season_features_adjusted %>%
  filter(Season == 2026) %>%
  select(TeamID, AdjNetEff)

filled_csv <- csv %>%
  left_join(
    team_strength_2026 %>%
      rename(
        HigherSeedID = TeamID,
        HigherSeed_AdjNetEff = AdjNetEff),
    by = "HigherSeedID") %>%
  left_join(
    team_strength_2026 %>%
      rename(
        LowerSeedID = TeamID,
        LowerSeed_AdjNetEff = AdjNetEff),
    by = "LowerSeedID") %>%
  mutate(
    AdjNetEffDiff = HigherSeed_AdjNetEff - LowerSeed_AdjNetEff,
    Predictions = predict(
      model_02b_adj_efficiency,
      newdata = tibble(AdjNetEffDiff = AdjNetEffDiff),
      type = "response")) %>%
  select(
    HigherSeed,
    HigherSeedID,
    HigherSeedNum,
    LowerSeed,
    LowerSeedID,
    LowerSeedNum,
    Predictions)

filled_csv
```

```{r}
#| label: export-submission-csv

write_csv(filled_csv, here("data", "processed", "joseph-corritone-mm2026-analytics-competition.csv"))
```

```{r}
#| label: setup-mm2026-bracket

bracket <- read_csv(here("data", "raw", "mm2026-bracket.csv")) %>%
  select(-TeamID) %>%
  left_join(data$teams %>% select(TeamID, TeamName), by = "TeamName") %>%
  select(Slot, TeamID, TeamName)

team_strength_2026 <- team_season_features_adjusted %>%
  filter(Season == 2026) %>%
  select(TeamID, AdjNetEff)

mm2026_bracket <- bracket %>%
  left_join(team_strength_2026, by = "TeamID")
```

```{r}
#| label: monte-carlo-bracket-simulation

set.seed(2015)

simulate_game <- function(team1, team2, model) {
  matchup <- tibble(
    AdjNetEffDiff = team1$AdjNetEff - team2$AdjNetEff)

  p_team1 <- predict(model, newdata = matchup, type = "response")

  if (runif(1) < p_team1) {
    team1
  } else {
    team2
  }
}

simulate_round <- function(teams_df, slot_order, model) {
  teams_ordered <- teams_df %>%
    mutate(Slot = factor(Slot, levels = slot_order)) %>%
    arrange(Slot)

  winners <- purrr::map_dfr(seq(1, nrow(teams_ordered), by = 2), function(i) {
    team1 <- teams_ordered[i, ]
    team2 <- teams_ordered[i + 1, ]
    simulate_game(team1, team2, model)
  })

  winners
}

region_slot_order <- c(
  "01", "16",
  "08", "09",
  "05", "12",
  "04", "13",
  "06", "11",
  "03", "14",
  "07", "10",
  "02", "15")

simulate_region <- function(region_prefix, bracket_df, model) {
  slot_order_r64 <- paste0(region_prefix, region_slot_order)

  region_teams <- bracket_df %>%
    filter(stringr::str_starts(Slot, region_prefix))

  r32 <- simulate_round(region_teams, slot_order_r64, model) %>%
    mutate(Slot = paste0(region_prefix, "_R32_", row_number()))

  s16 <- simulate_round(
    r32,
    paste0(region_prefix, "_R32_", 1:8),
    model
  ) %>%
    mutate(Slot = paste0(region_prefix, "_S16_", row_number()))

  e8 <- simulate_round(
    s16,
    paste0(region_prefix, "_S16_", 1:4),
    model
  ) %>%
    mutate(Slot = paste0(region_prefix, "_E8_", row_number()))

  f4 <- simulate_round(
    e8,
    paste0(region_prefix, "_E8_", 1:2),
    model
  ) %>%
    mutate(Slot = paste0(region_prefix, "_F4_", row_number()))

  list(
    r32 = r32,
    s16 = s16,
    e8 = e8,
    f4 = f4
  )
}

simulate_tournament_once <- function(bracket_df, model) {
  west <- simulate_region("W", bracket_df, model)
  east <- simulate_region("X", bracket_df, model)
  south <- simulate_region("Y", bracket_df, model)
  midwest <- simulate_region("Z", bracket_df, model)

  final_four <- bind_rows(
    west$f4 %>% mutate(FFSlot = "FF1"),
    east$f4 %>% mutate(FFSlot = "FF2"),
    south$f4 %>% mutate(FFSlot = "FF3"),
    midwest$f4 %>% mutate(FFSlot = "FF4")
  )

  semi1 <- simulate_game(
    final_four %>% filter(FFSlot == "FF1"),
    final_four %>% filter(FFSlot == "FF2"),
    model
  )

  semi2 <- simulate_game(
    final_four %>% filter(FFSlot == "FF3"),
    final_four %>% filter(FFSlot == "FF4"),
    model
  )

  championship_teams <- bind_rows(
    semi1 %>% mutate(Game = "Title1"),
    semi2 %>% mutate(Game = "Title2")
  )

  champion <- simulate_game(
    championship_teams %>% filter(Game == "Title1"),
    championship_teams %>% filter(Game == "Title2"),
    model
  )

  list(
    r32 = bind_rows(west$r32, east$r32, south$r32, midwest$r32),
    s16 = bind_rows(west$s16, east$s16, south$s16, midwest$s16),
    e8 = bind_rows(west$e8, east$e8, south$e8, midwest$e8),
    f4 = final_four,
    f2 = bind_rows(semi1, semi2),
    champ = champion
  )
}

n_sims <- 10000

all_teams <- mm2026_bracket %>%
  select(TeamID, TeamName) %>%
  distinct()

sim_results <- purrr::map(seq_len(n_sims), function(i) {
  sim <- simulate_tournament_once(
    bracket_df = mm2026_bracket,
    model = model_02b_adj_efficiency
  )

  list(
    r32 = sim$r32 %>% select(TeamID),
    s16 = sim$s16 %>% select(TeamID),
    e8 = sim$e8 %>% select(TeamID),
    f4 = sim$f4 %>% select(TeamID),
    f2 = sim$f2 %>% select(TeamID),
    champ = sim$champ %>% select(TeamID)
  )
})

reach_r32 <- bind_rows(purrr::map(sim_results, "r32"), .id = "Sim") %>%
  count(TeamID, name = "R32_Count")

reach_s16 <- bind_rows(purrr::map(sim_results, "s16"), .id = "Sim") %>%
  count(TeamID, name = "S16_Count")

reach_e8 <- bind_rows(purrr::map(sim_results, "e8"), .id = "Sim") %>%
  count(TeamID, name = "E8_Count")

reach_f4 <- bind_rows(purrr::map(sim_results, "f4"), .id = "Sim") %>%
  count(TeamID, name = "F4_Count")

reach_f2 <- bind_rows(purrr::map(sim_results, "f2"), .id = "Sim") %>%
  count(TeamID, name = "F2_Count")

win_champ <- bind_rows(purrr::map(sim_results, "champ"), .id = "Sim") %>%
  count(TeamID, name = "Champ_Count")

team_round_probs <- all_teams %>%
  left_join(reach_r32, by = "TeamID") %>%
  left_join(reach_s16, by = "TeamID") %>%
  left_join(reach_e8, by = "TeamID") %>%
  left_join(reach_f4, by = "TeamID") %>%
  left_join(reach_f2, by = "TeamID") %>%
  left_join(win_champ, by = "TeamID") %>%
  mutate(
    across(ends_with("_Count"), ~ replace_na(.x, 0L)),
    Prob_R32 = R32_Count / n_sims,
    Prob_S16 = S16_Count / n_sims,
    Prob_E8 = E8_Count / n_sims,
    Prob_F4 = F4_Count / n_sims,
    Prob_F2 = F2_Count / n_sims,
    Prob_Champ = Champ_Count / n_sims
  ) %>%
  select(
    TeamName,
    Prob_R32,
    Prob_S16,
    Prob_E8,
    Prob_F4,
    Prob_F2,
    Prob_Champ) %>%
  arrange(desc(Prob_Champ))

team_round_probs
```
